title: Security Audit
description: Scan websites for security vulnerabilities — HTTP headers, exposed endpoints, common misconfigurations, and OWASP top 10 checks
author: Jarvis Inc

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Security scan of a website — checks HTTP security headers, exposed sensitive paths, SSL/TLS configuration, and common vulnerabilities

returns.description: Security scan report with severity-rated findings and remediation steps

commands.name: check_headers
commands.description: Quick check of HTTP security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.)

returns.description: Security header analysis with present/missing headers and grades
